summary: Iteration 12 Testing Complete - N+1 Query Optimization & Enhanced Chatbot Filters. All 14 backend tests passed. Frontend fully functional with filter badges rendering, parcel cards, and fly-to on click.
passed_tests: === CHATBOT ADVANCED FILTERS (7/7) ===
POST /api/chat with PLU filter: 'parcelles en zone U PACA 1ha' → filters_applied.plu_zones=['U'], all parcels have plu_zone=U or inconnu
POST /api/chat with HTB distance filter: 'terrains à moins de 2km d un poste' → filters_applied.max_dist_htb_km=2, all parcels have dist_poste_htb_m ≤ 2000
POST /api/chat with future 400kV filter: 'parcelles à moins de 3km de la future ligne 400kV' → filters_applied.max_dist_future_line_km=3, all parcels have dist_future_400kv_m ≤ 3000
POST /api/chat with tension filter: 'parcelles près d un poste 400kV' → filters_applied.min_tension_kv=400, all parcels have tension_htb_kv ≥ 400
POST /api/chat with surface filter: 'terrains de 5 hectares minimum' → filters_applied.min_surface_ha=5, all parcels have surface_ha ≥ 5
filters_applied field present in response with all filter fields: min_surface_ha, max_surface_ha, max_dist_htb_km, min_tension_kv, max_dist_future_line_km, plu_zones, search_radius_m
POST /api/chat with 'Résumé S3REnR' still returns type=summary with 3 regions
=== N+1 QUERY OPTIMIZATION (2/2) ===
GET /api/shortlists returns 200 (optimized with aggregation pipeline for item counts)
GET /api/parcels returns 200 (optimized with batch $in query for scores)
=== PREVIOUS FEATURES STILL WORK (5/5) ===
GET /api/map/rte-future-400kv returns line + buffers
GET /api/map/electrical-assets returns 101+ postes HTB
POST /api/export/pdf returns valid PDF
GET /api/dvf/commune/13039 returns DVF data
POST /api/dc/search returns search results
=== FRONTEND VERIFICATION ===
Dashboard loads with COCKPIT IMMO header and map
Chatbot opens with 'Assistant Cockpit Immo' panel
Chat input accepts messages and sends to API
Parcel search returns parcel_results with clickable parcel cards
Filter badges render: ≥2ha (surface), HTB≤5km (HTB distance)
Parcel cards show: ref_cadastrale, surface (ha), score, commune, HTB distance, PLU zone, 400kV info
Clicking parcel card flies map to parcel location (Fos-sur-Mer)
Clicking parcel card opens ParcelDetail panel with full info
ParcelDetail shows Future 400kV section: distance, zone (ZONE STRATÉGIQUE), bonus scoring (+20 pts)
seed_data_creation: No seed data needed - uses real IGN Carto API for cadastral parcels
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 12 tested N+1 query optimizations and enhanced chatbot filters. Key findings: 1) All advanced filters work correctly: PLU zone, HTB distance, future 400kV distance, tension kV, surface min/max. 2) filters_applied field is present in all parcel_results responses. 3) N+1 optimizations in server.py: parcels endpoint uses batch $in query for scores (lines 308-314), shortlists endpoint uses aggregation pipeline for item counts (lines 1255-1261), shortlist detail uses batch fetch for parcels and scores (lines 1311-1325). 4) Frontend renders filter badges correctly (≥Xha, HTB≤Xkm, PLU:X, etc.). 5) Response time for parcel search is 5-15 seconds due to LLM + IGN API calls.

enhanced_filters.plu_zones: Filter by PLU zone (U, AU, UI, etc.) - works
enhanced_filters.max_dist_htb_km: Maximum distance to HTB substation - works
enhanced_filters.max_dist_future_line_km: Maximum distance to future 400kV line - works

mocked_api_note: No mocked APIs - uses real IGN Carto API for cadastral parcels and Emergent LLM key for NLP parsing
